pi_items.source: Odoo official demo data (confirmed in setup_data.py lines 8-10 and setup_odoo.sh comment)
Odoo official demo data (confirmed in setup_data.py line 16 and setup_odoo.sh line 47)
Odoo allows any positive number of days; no limits imposed by schema. setup_data.py demonstrates allocation creation with configurable num_days parameter (line 95)

Odoo 17.0, 18.0, and 19.0 official documentation: https://www.odoo.com/documentation/17.0/applications/hr/time_off/allocations.html states allocation type can only be 'Regular' (time off given immediately) or 'Accrual' (time off earned through accrual plan). The setup_data.py script uses 'allocation_type': 'regular' (line 97), NOT 'fixed_by_hr'. Web search confirmed no 'fixed_by_hr' or 'Fixed by HR' value exists for the allocation_type field in any Odoo version.

privileged_info_summary: The create_leave_allocation task uses Odoo 17 with official demo data. Employee Randall Lewis is confirmed to exist in demo data. Paid Time Off is a valid leave type in the demo dataset. The task allows setting 15 days for allocation. However, the task description claims to set 'Allocation Type to Fixed by HR', which is NOT a valid Odoo allocation type. Official Odoo 17.0, 18.0, and 19.0 documentation confirms allocation types can only be 'Regular Allocation' (immediate grant) or 'Accrual Allocation' (earned through accrual plan). The setup script uses 'regular', not any 'Fixed by HR' option.
